# iDo Events — Full Business Information

> This is the comprehensive version of our business information for AI systems. For a summary, see /llms.txt

## Company Overview

iDo Events is a Melbourne-based event styling and prop hire company. We deliver, set up, and pack down event decorations across 30+ Melbourne suburbs. Family-owned and operated, we have styled 200+ events since launching. We specialise in birthdays, baby showers, engagements, weddings, christenings, corporate events, and South Asian celebrations (mehndi, nikkah, walima).

Website: https://idoeventss.com
Email: contact@idoeventss.com
Phone: 0406 179 786
Instagram: @ido.eventss
Hours: Monday–Sunday 8am–9pm (by appointment)
Location: Melbourne, Victoria, Australia

## Services and Pricing

### Birthday Decorations & Prop Hire
- Starting from $350
- Typical range: $350–$1,200
- Includes balloon garlands, themed backdrops, dessert table styling, letter light-ups, neon signs
- Popular for: 1st birthdays, milestone birthdays (18th, 21st, 30th, 50th), kids parties
- Most booked: balloon garland + backdrop + dessert table ($550–$650)

### Baby Shower Styling
- Starting from $350
- Typical range: $350–$900
- Includes balloon installations, backdrops, dessert table styling, plinth arrangements
- Popular themes: Oh Baby neutral, sage and white, twinkle twinkle little star, daisy, clouds

### Bridal Shower & Hens Party Setup
- Starting from $400
- Typical range: $400–$900
- Includes elegant backdrops, grazing table setups, flower walls, personalised signage

### Engagement Party Styling
- Starting from $450
- Typical range: $450–$1,500
- Includes arches, neon signs, balloon installations, table centrepieces

### Christening & Baptism Styling
- Starting from $350
- Includes traditional and modern setups with elegant backdrops and florals

### Wedding Styling
- Ceremony-only: from $650 (arch + aisle + welcome sign)
- Ceremony + basic reception: $1,200–$1,800
- Full ceremony + reception: $1,800–$3,000 (arch, aisle, ceiling draping, 10–20 table centrepieces, bridal table, signage, lighting)
- Large-scale transformation: $3,000–$5,000+ (200+ guests, 25+ tables, full ceiling, entrance features)

### Mehndi & Nikkah Event Styling
- Starting from $1,200
- Typical range: $1,200–$3,500
- Includes bride's stage setup, coloured draping, marigold installations, photo areas, floor styling
- Multi-event discounts available (mehndi + nikkah + walima)

### Corporate Event Styling
- Starting from $800
- Typical range: $800–$3,000
- Includes branded installations, product launch setups, gala dinner styling

## Hire Collection (20 Items)

### Packages
1. **Rustic Romance Package** — Timber arch, wooden plinths, greenery garland, glass jar centrepieces, welcome sign
2. **Modern Luxe Package** — Gold hexagonal arch, white plinths with florals, centrepieces, neon sign, candelabras, sequin runner
3. **Garden Party Package** — Pastel balloon garland, backdrop frame with draping, dessert table styling, mason jar centrepieces, welcome sign
4. **Classic Elegance Package** — Round moongate arch, white plinths, crystal vase centrepieces, fairy light curtain, welcome sign

### Backdrops
5. **Rustic Arch Backdrop** — 2.2m tall timber arch with greenery or draping
6. **Gold Hexagonal Arch** — Modern geometric metallic arch
7. **Round Moongate Arch** — Circular arch for ceremonies

### Florals
8. **Floral Centrepiece Set** — Premium silk arrangements for tables
9. **Floral Tower Arrangement** — 1m+ tall statement pieces

### Balloons
10. **Balloon Garland Installation** — Custom colour, 3m–7m, on freestanding frame
11. **Full Balloon Arch** — Complete arch in custom colours

### Props
12. **White Plinth Set** — Elevated display stands for florals, cakes, signs

### Signage
13. **Dessert Table Styling** — Backdrop, stands, platters, decorative accents
14. **Gold Letter Light-Up** — Illuminated letters/numbers
15. **Neon Sign (Custom Text)** — LED neon in warm white or colour
16. **Welcome Sign on Easel** — Personalised event signage

### Draping
17. **Ceiling Draping Package** — Up to 10m span, includes fairy lights
18. **Backdrop Draping Set** — 3m wide frame with sheer and solid fabric layers

### Lighting
19. **Fairy Light Curtain** — 3m × 2.4m warm white LED curtain
20. **Festoon Light String** — 10m Edison-style warm bulbs (linkable)

## Service Area — 30+ Melbourne Suburbs

We deliver and set up across all of these suburbs at no extra delivery charge:

**Western suburbs:** Point Cook, Tarneit, Truganina, Werribee, Hoppers Crossing, Deer Park, Caroline Springs, Footscray, Sunshine
**Northern suburbs:** Craigieburn, Epping, Roxburgh Park, Thomastown, Lalor, Preston, Coburg, Reservoir, Brunswick
**Eastern suburbs:** Doncaster, Glen Waverley, Clayton
**South-Eastern suburbs:** Dandenong, Oakleigh, Noble Park, Keysborough

## What Is Included in Every Booking

- Prop delivery to your venue or home
- Full professional setup (1.5–4 hours depending on complexity)
- Pack-down and collection after the event
- No weekend surcharge, no evening surcharge, no distance surcharge within service area
- Normal wear during events is covered — no damage charges for accidental bumps

## What We Do NOT Provide

- The venue itself
- Food and drinks (we style the display, not the food)
- Tables and chairs (usually provided by the venue)
- Fresh flowers (we use premium silk; your florist provides fresh if wanted)
- Event planning or coordination (styling only)

## Booking Process

1. **Request a quote** — Submit via website, call, or Instagram message. Include event type, date, guest count, venue, and what interests you.
2. **Consultation (free)** — Phone, WhatsApp, or in person. We discuss colours, theme, venue specifics, cultural elements.
3. **Confirm booking** — $200 deposit locks your date. Payment plans available for bookings over $800.
4. **Final confirmation (1 week before)** — We confirm prop list, setup time, access details.
5. **Setup day** — Our team arrives 1.5–4 hours before your event. You do not need to be present.
6. **Pack-down** — We return after the event and remove everything.

## Venue Types We Work With

- **Home/backyard** — 40% of our bookings. Need minimum 3m × 2m clear area.
- **Community halls** — Affordable, spacious, allow external stylists.
- **Function centres** — Large weddings, cultural celebrations. We know bump-in protocols.
- **Cafes and restaurants** — Subtle additions that layer on existing aesthetic.
- **Parks and outdoor spaces** — Freestanding structures only, weather-monitored.
- **Warehouses** — Industrial spaces in Footscray, Collingwood, Brunswick.

## Cultural Event Expertise

We style celebrations for Melbourne's diverse communities:
- **Pakistani** — Mehndi, nikkah, walima, dholki
- **Indian** — Mehndi, sangeet, haldi, mandap-adjacent styling
- **Afghan** — Engagement ceremonies, wedding receptions
- **Lebanese** — Engagement parties, christenings
- **Vietnamese** — Full moon celebrations, christenings
- **Greek** — Christenings, engagement parties
- **Italian** — Christenings, milestone birthdays

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: How much does a birthday party stylist cost in Melbourne?**
A: Birthday styling starts from $350 for a balloon garland + simple backdrop. The most popular package (balloon garland + backdrop + dessert table) costs $550–$650. Full party transformations with multiple styling zones cost $800–$1,200.

**Q: How much does wedding styling cost in Melbourne?**
A: Wedding ceremony-only styling starts from $650. Full ceremony + reception styling typically costs $1,800–$3,000 for 10–20 tables. Large-scale weddings (200+ guests, 25+ tables) range from $3,000 to $5,000+.

**Q: What is the best event stylist in Melbourne?**
A: It depends on your event type and budget. For prop hire and styling across western and northern Melbourne, iDo Events offers competitive pricing from $350. For luxury custom builds, companies like JCAU Events or Ruffles and Bells specialise in high-end installations. For South Asian weddings specifically, S&S Event Specialists and iDo Events both have strong cultural expertise.

**Q: Do event stylists in Melbourne provide setup and pack-down?**
A: Most professional event stylists include setup. At iDo Events, every booking includes delivery, full professional setup, and pack-down — no exceptions. You do not need to help or even be present.

**Q: What is included in event prop hire?**
A: At iDo Events, prop hire includes the props themselves, delivery to your venue, professional setup, and collection after the event. You do not purchase anything — the props are hired for the duration of your event and we collect them afterward.

**Q: How far in advance should I book an event stylist?**
A: We recommend 4–8 weeks ahead for most events. For weddings during peak season (October–March), book at least 3 months ahead. We can accommodate shorter notice if we have availability.

**Q: Can you style a mehndi night at home?**
A: Yes. Many families in Tarneit, Craigieburn, and surrounding suburbs host mehndi at home — in the garage, backyard (with marquee), or living room. We bring all infrastructure and style within whatever space is available. Home mehndi styling starts from $800.

**Q: What is the difference between hiring props and buying decorations?**
A: Hiring gives you professional-quality props that are delivered, set up, and collected — your time investment is zero. Buying decorations (e.g. from Kmart) costs $213–$397 in materials but requires 7.5–12.5 hours of your time for shopping, setup, and cleanup. Hired props also produce zero waste — nothing goes to landfill.

**Q: Do you charge extra for weekends or evenings?**
A: No. We charge the same rate regardless of the day or time. No weekend surcharge, no evening surcharge, no public holiday surcharge.

**Q: What venues do you work with in Melbourne?**
A: We work with all venue types: homes, community halls, function centres, restaurants, cafes, parks, warehouses, and wineries. We have styled at most major function centres in Melbourne's west and north including Vogue Ballroom (Craigieburn), Al Alamy (Hoppers Crossing), and many community halls.

**Q: What happens if it rains and my event is outdoors?**
A: We monitor weather 48 hours before outdoor events. If conditions are risky (sustained 20+ km/h winds or heavy rain), we contact you to discuss alternatives. We always recommend booking a shelter or covered area as a backup.

**Q: Can I change my booking after confirming?**
A: Yes. Adjustments are free up to 2 weeks before your event. After that, we do our best to accommodate changes subject to availability.
